ValidationRule.description: Blocks review and approval without FCRA credit pull consent.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Under Review"), ISPICKVAL(Status__c, "Approved") ), NOT(ISBLANK(Applicant__c)), NOT(Applicant__r.Credit_Pull_Consent__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Applicant Credit Pull Consent must be completed before review or approval.
